title: benzoin lucidum
intro: Benzoin lucidum, also known as Sumatran Styrax or Staran, is a plant species in the family Styracaceae. It is a type of resinous tree native to Sumatra, Indonesia, known for its medicinal properties due to the presence of benzoin, a resinous substance with anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of benzoin lucidum include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, relieve stress and anxiety, and aid in the healing of wounds. Benzoin lucidum can be used in various herbal preparations, such as tinctures, infusions, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties.
